generations.notes: Baseline FSM vs FSM. P1 dominates (93% P1+TO rate). Code state includes directional defense_pos fix and multi-faction FSM.

scripts: various combat micro, economy, production scripts
generations.notes: Gens 1-9 all failed. Combat scripts override FSM (catastrophic). Economy scripts steal building budget. Production scripts with >= 100 food thresholds never trigger (food peaks at ~95 during idle windows). Diagnostic data proved the 95 food ceiling.
First script to trigger (80 food threshold). Changed trajectories but extra Nuisances feed the enemy. Net neutral.

BREAKTHROUGH. Smart production: Hisser>Nuisance from CatTree, Mouser from ServerRack. Gated behind 5+ completed buildings. 15-seed: 7% -> 53% P0 win rate. P0 trains +1-7 extra units per game. Eliminated all timeouts.
Variations on Gen 12. Supply management, extra workers, and Chonk priority all produce identical or near-identical results. The core insight is idle building production fill.

FSM SYMMETRY FIX applied: directional defense_pos toward map center (was hardcoded +3,+3), map-center fallbacks (was hardcoded GridPos(55,55)), mirrored forward_pos in defend commands, pre-seeded enemy_spawn from SpawnPositions. Also added --shared-scripts CLI flag.
Post-symmetry-fix FSM-only benchmark. P1 still wins 50% decisive, P0 wins 0 decisive. Kill counts much closer than before. Remaining asymmetry is map generation terrain, not FSM code.
Both players get 3 proven scripts (priority_focus, push_buildings, smart_retreat). Same 50-50 as FSM-only. Confirms scripts don't break symmetry.
REGRESSION. 5 scripts (baselines + smart_fill + abilities) = 10% P0. smart_fill trains fodder that feeds enemy. Games end faster (2600-3500 ticks). DO NOT combine smart_fill with ability scripts.

MASSIVE BREAKTHROUGH. Baselines + activate_abilities ONLY (no smart_fill). P0 wins 2 decisive + leads 6/8 timeouts = effectively dominates 8/10 seeds. P0 outscores P1 in kills on ALL 10 seeds. LoafMode/Zoomies/DissonantScreech provide huge combat advantage. Key: abilities > extra units.

NEW BEST. Pure combat micro: focus fire weakest enemy + retreat wounded when outnumbered + push to enemy buildings when area clear. 0% baseline -> 50% P0 win rate. Focus fire + retreat is the core — push converts timeouts to wins. No production interference (smart_fill now counterproductive since FSM does own production fill).

CATASTROPHIC REGRESSION. Ability commands (especially LoafMode toggle) interfere with combat_micro focus fire. Units stutter between ability and attack commands. DO NOT combine ability activation with combat micro.

CATASTROPHIC. Per-unit focus fire (each unit targets weakest in its range) scatters damage across multiple targets. Group centroid-based focus fire (Gen 21) is far superior. Concentrated fire > distributed fire.

NEW BEST. Multi-faction ability implementation + improved activate_abilities (TacticalUplink toggle, lower DissonantScreech threshold to 2, more aggressive Zoomies at 40% HP). 70% decisive P0 win rate, 100% effective dominance. P0 leads all 3 timeouts. 7 new StatusEffectId variants (Stunned, Silenced, Entrenched, SpeedBuff, ArmorBuff, DamageBuff, PlayingDead). 40+ abilities implemented across all 6 factions.

key_insights: GROUP focus fire (centroid-based, all units target same enemy) is the single most impactful script behavior. 0% -> 50% win rate.
Retreat wounded units when outnumbered preserves army for attrition advantage.
Push to enemy buildings when area is clear converts timeouts to wins.
smart_fill is counterproductive on current FSM (FSM does own production fill). Extra units feed enemy kills.
Ability commands interfere with attack commands — DO NOT combine ability and combat scripts for same units.
Per-unit focus fire scatters damage. Group focus fire concentrates it. Always prefer group.
Script combinations matter: fewer focused scripts beat more scripts that conflict.
TacticalUplink (MechCommander toggle) + more aggressive ability thresholds pushed win rate from 50% to 70%.
Multi-faction ability implementation provides gameplay depth — 40+ abilities now have real effects across all 6 factions.
